schema.appName: SWP Retirement Calculator — How Long Will My Corpus Last?
schema.appDescription: Find out how many years your retirement corpus will last with monthly SWP withdrawals at given return rates.

howToSteps.name: Enter your details
howToSteps.text: Fill in the input fields for the SWP Retirement Calculator.

howToSteps.name: View instant results
howToSteps.text: Results update in real time as you type.

howToSteps.name: Explore breakdown
howToSteps.text: Open the year-by-year breakdown to see numbers over time.

howToSteps.name: Compare scenarios
howToSteps.text: Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and optimise your decision.

faq.q: What withdrawal rate makes my corpus last forever?
faq.a: At 8% return: annual withdrawal of 8% of corpus depletes corpus exactly at the end of the first year (oversimplified). Realistically, with monthly compounding and balanced SWP, a withdrawal rate equal to the return rate is approximately sustainable indefinitely. SWP of 6–7% of corpus typically lasts 30+ years at 8% return.

faq.q: How does inflation affect SWP sustainability?
faq.a: If you fix monthly withdrawal at ₹75,000 while inflation runs at 6%, your real purchasing power halves in 12 years. Consider a step-up SWP — increase withdrawal by 5–6%/year. This reduces initial withdrawal but maintains lifestyle quality. The trade-off: corpus depletes faster.

faq.q: What funds are best for SWP?
faq.a: For retirement SWP: balanced advantage funds (automatic asset allocation), hybrid funds, or a combination of equity + debt. Avoid withdrawing from equity funds during market downturns — maintain 1–2 years of withdrawals in liquid funds as a buffer. This 'bucket strategy' protects against sequence-of-returns risk.
No. Calculations run in your browser.
Yes. Works on all modern smartphones.

examples.heading: ₹1 crore corpus — ₹75,000/month SWP at 8%
examples.text: ₹1 crore at 8%, withdrawing ₹75,000/month (9% annual withdrawal rate): corpus lasts approximately 18 years. Reducing to ₹60,000/month: lasts 25 years. At ₹50,000/month (6% withdrawal rate): corpus lasts 30+ years and may actually grow.

examples.heading: ₹2 crore corpus — sustainable withdrawal
examples.text: At ₹2 crore with 8% return: sustainable withdrawal = ₹1,33,000/month (annual return = annual withdrawal, corpus never depletes). More conservatively at 6%: ₹1,00,000/month. Build corpus to a level where desired lifestyle = 6% of corpus × 1/12.
